qa_pairs.question: Which users named mike1886 have post history comments exactly saying "added 104 characters in body" on posts that have at least 0 comments and are linked to parent posts?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT users.id FROM users
JOIN posthistory ON users.id = posthistory.userid
JOIN posts ON posthistory.postid = posts.id
JOIN posts AS posts__1 ON posts.parentid = posts__1.id
WHERE posthistory.comment = 'added 104 characters in body' AND posts.commentcount >= 0 AND users.displayname = 'mike1886'

qa_pairs.question: Which users named muratoa with account IDs at most 459982 and no more than 0 downvotes have comments created exactly on 2012-08-25 15:02:23.0 linked to posts with a parent post?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT users.id FROM users
JOIN comments ON users.id = comments.userid
JOIN posts ON comments.postid = posts.id
JOIN posts AS posts__1 ON posts.parentid = posts__1.id
WHERE users.displayname = 'muratoa' AND users.accountid <= 459982 AND users.downvotes <= 0 AND comments.creationdate = '2012-08-25 15:02:23.0'
